casinoAgg.heroSubtitle: Access 10,000+ games from 200+ world-class providers through a single API. Slots, live casino, table games, crash games and more — one integration, unlimited content.
casinoAgg.contentSubtitle: From classic slots to live dealer and crash games — offer your players the full spectrum of casino entertainment.
casinoAgg.featuresSubtitle: Built for operators who demand the best content, the fastest integration and the most reliable infrastructure.
casinoAgg.f1Desc: Connect once, access all providers. Our unified API handles game sessions, wallet transactions, round history and player management across every provider.
casinoAgg.f2Desc: Slots, live casino, table games, crash games, virtual sports and instant win games — the largest content library available through one integration.
casinoAgg.f3Desc: Track GGR, player activity, game performance and provider metrics in real time. Identify top-performing content and optimize your game lobby.
casinoAgg.f4Desc: Geo-targeted game availability, multi-currency wallets and language localization. Deliver the right content to the right market automatically.
casinoAgg.f5Desc: Full control over your game lobby: enable/disable games, create categories, set featured games, configure RTP limits and manage provider priorities.
casinoAgg.f6Desc: All games are certified by independent testing labs. We handle provider compliance so you can focus on growing your business.
casinoAgg.f7Desc: Beautiful, responsive game lobby with search, filters, favorites, recently played and dynamic categories. Works on desktop, tablet and mobile.
casinoAgg.f8Desc: New providers and games added every month. Stay ahead of the competition with the freshest content automatically available in your lobby.
casinoAgg.f9Desc: Sub-second game loading times with our CDN-powered delivery infrastructure. No lag, no downtime — 99.9% uptime guaranteed.
casinoAgg.providerSubtitle: We partner with the biggest names in the industry to deliver an unmatched content portfolio.
casinoAgg.providerListSubtitle: Every provider available through our aggregation platform
casinoAgg.step1Desc: Integrate our RESTful API into your platform. Comprehensive documentation, sandbox environment and dedicated technical support included.
casinoAgg.step2Desc: Choose which providers and games to activate. Set up categories, featured games, geo-restrictions and player preferences.
casinoAgg.step3Desc: Launch your game lobby and start generating revenue. We handle all provider communication, updates and compliance behind the scenes.
casinoAgg.benefitDesc: Instead of signing separate deals and building individual integrations with each game provider, connect to MATGAMING once and get instant access to the entire ecosystem. Save months of development time and ongoing maintenance costs.
casinoAgg.s1Desc: Integrate our RESTful API into your platform. Comprehensive documentation, sandbox environment and dedicated technical support included.

casinoAgg.s3Desc: Launch your game lobby and start generating revenue. We handle all provider communication, updates and compliance behind the scenes.

sportsbookAgg.heroSubtitle: Offer a premium sportsbook experience with BetConstruct, Digitain and Betradar. Pre-match, live betting, 50+ sports, thousands of markets — integrated and ready to launch.
sportsbookAgg.partnersSubtitle: We've partnered with the top three sportsbook providers in the world, giving you the flexibility to choose the best fit for your market.
sportsbookAgg.capabilitiesSubtitle: Everything you need to run a professional sportsbook operation, from odds management to risk control.
sportsbookAgg.f1Desc: Choose from BetConstruct, Digitain and Betradar — the three leading sportsbook platforms — or combine them for maximum coverage.
sportsbookAgg.f2Desc: Full pre-match and in-play betting with live scores, statistics, match trackers and real-time odds updates across all providers.
sportsbookAgg.f3Desc: Football, basketball, tennis, cricket, esports, virtual sports and more. Cover every market your players care about.
sportsbookAgg.f4Desc: AI-powered odds compilation, automated risk management, customizable margins and real-time liability monitoring.
sportsbookAgg.f5Desc: Bet builder, accumulators, cash-out, live streaming integration and personalized bet suggestions to maximize player retention.
sportsbookAgg.f6Desc: Customizable UI, betting rules, market configurations, limits and risk parameters. Make the sportsbook truly yours.
sportsbookAgg.f7Desc: Automated fraud detection, player profiling, stake limits, liability management and suspicious betting pattern alerts.
sportsbookAgg.f8Desc: Sub-second odds updates, instant bet settlement and high-availability infrastructure for peak event traffic.
sportsbookAgg.f9Desc: Turnover, margin, liability, player behavior and event-level analytics. Export reports or access data via API.
sportsbookAgg.comboDesc: Combine our casino aggregator with any sportsbook provider for a complete iGaming platform. Shared wallet, unified player accounts, cross-product bonuses and a single backoffice to manage everything.

whiteLabel.heroTitle: Launch Your Casino In Weeks, Not Months
whiteLabel.heroSubtitle: A complete, turnkey casino platform under your brand. Player management, payment processing, bonus engine, affiliate system and a powerful backoffice — everything included, ready to go live.
whiteLabel.allInOneTitle: Everything You Need Out of the Box
whiteLabel.allInOneSubtitle: Our White Label platform is a complete, production-ready casino solution. No development required — just connect your domain and go live.
includes: Complete casino website with your branding
whiteLabel.paymentsSubtitle: Accept deposits and process withdrawals globally. Credit cards, bank transfers, e-wallets, cryptocurrency and local payment methods for every market.
whiteLabel.backofficeSubtitle: The brain of your casino operation. Complete control over every aspect of your business from a single, intuitive admin panel.
whiteLabel.bf1Desc: Real-time overview of revenue, active players, deposits, withdrawals and game performance. Everything at a glance in a clean, intuitive interface.
whiteLabel.bf2Desc: Full player profiles with activity history, segmentation, manual account actions, notes, tags and communication tools. Know your players inside out.
whiteLabel.bf3Desc: Welcome bonuses, deposit bonuses, free spins, cashback, reload offers, tournaments, loyalty programs and VIP tiers. 200+ configurable parameters.
whiteLabel.bf4Desc: Built-in identity verification, document upload & review, anti-money laundering checks and responsible gambling tools with automated triggers.
whiteLabel.bf5Desc: Financial reports, player behavior analytics, game performance metrics, GGR/NGR tracking, retention analysis and custom report builder with export.
whiteLabel.bf6Desc: Betting limits, loss limits, session limits. Automated fraud detection, suspicious activity alerts, player blocking and configurable risk rules.
whiteLabel.bf7Desc: Support unlimited languages and currencies. Geo-based content delivery, localized payment methods and region-specific configurations.
whiteLabel.bf8Desc: Banner management, email campaigns, push notifications, pop-ups, landing page builder and SEO tools for player acquisition and retention.
whiteLabel.bf9Desc: Built-in affiliate management with tracking links, commission plans (CPA, RevShare, Hybrid), real-time statistics, payment management and reporting.
whiteLabel.bf10Desc: Deposit and withdrawal management with 100+ payment methods. Transaction monitoring, auto-approvals, manual review queues and chargeback handling.
whiteLabel.bf11Desc: Enable/disable games and providers, create categories, manage lobby layouts, set featured games and configure RTP limits per market.
whiteLabel.bf12Desc: Complete activity trail for every admin action, player transaction, configuration change and system event. Full transparency and compliance.

cryptoCasino.heroSubtitle: The same powerful White Label platform, built natively for the cryptocurrency market. Accept Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT and 50+ coins with instant transactions, zero chargebacks and global reach.
cryptoCasino.coinsSubtitle: Accept the most popular cryptocurrencies and stablecoins. New coins added on request.
cryptoCasino.whyCryptoDesc: Cryptocurrency casinos are the fastest-growing segment in iGaming. Lower costs, faster transactions, global reach and no dependency on traditional banking infrastructure.
cryptoCasino.adv1Desc: Crypto transactions are irreversible — no more chargeback fraud.
cryptoCasino.adv2Desc: Significantly lower transaction costs compared to cards and bank transfers.
cryptoCasino.adv3Desc: No waiting for bank processing. Deposits and withdrawals in minutes.
cryptoCasino.adv4Desc: Reach players in markets where traditional banking is limited or unavailable.
cryptoCasino.adv5Desc: Offer privacy-conscious players the anonymity they want.
cryptoCasino.featuresSubtitle: Everything from wallet management to provably fair gaming — built for the crypto-native operator.
cryptoCasino.f1Desc: Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT (TRC20 & ERC20), Litecoin, Ripple, Dogecoin, BNB, Solana, Cardano, USDC, DAI and many more.
cryptoCasino.f2Desc: Crypto deposits credited within minutes. Withdrawals processed automatically with configurable approval thresholds and hot wallet management.
cryptoCasino.f3Desc: Enterprise-grade wallet security with hot/cold wallet architecture, multi-signature transactions and automated fund sweeping.
cryptoCasino.f4Desc: Automatic fiat-crypto conversion with real-time exchange rates. Players can deposit in any supported coin and play in their preferred currency.
cryptoCasino.f5Desc: Optional email-only or wallet-only registration for privacy-focused markets. Full KYC available when required by regulation.
cryptoCasino.f6Desc: Support for provably fair gaming verification, giving your players cryptographic proof that every game result is unbiased.
cryptoCasino.f7Desc: Players can hold balances in multiple cryptocurrencies simultaneously. Internal exchange between coins with competitive rates.
cryptoCasino.f8Desc: No banking restrictions, no chargebacks, no currency conversion fees. Accept players from markets where traditional payments don't reach.
cryptoCasino.f9Desc: Track deposits, withdrawals and player activity by coin. Monitor wallet balances, transaction volumes and conversion rates in real time.
cryptoCasino.f10Desc: Configure bonuses in BTC, ETH or any supported coin. Welcome packages, deposit matches, free spins and loyalty rewards — all crypto-native.
cryptoCasino.f11Desc: Set minimum/maximum deposit and withdrawal amounts per coin. Configure auto-withdrawal thresholds and manual review triggers.
cryptoCasino.f12Desc: Same powerful backoffice as our White Label platform: player management, bonus engine, risk tools, reports and affiliate system.
cryptoCasino.whyDesc: Cryptocurrency casinos are the fastest-growing segment in iGaming. Lower costs, faster transactions, global reach and no dependency on traditional banking infrastructure.

curacaoLicense.heroSubtitle: Fast-track your iGaming business with a Curacao gaming license. Both Orange (sub-license) and Green (master license) available — processed in just 6-8 weeks with full legal and compliance support.
curacaoLicense.typesSubtitle: Choose the license type that best fits your business model and growth plans.
curacaoLicense.orangeDesc: Operate under an existing master license holder. The fastest and most cost-effective way to get licensed in Curacao. Ideal for new operators who want to launch quickly.
curacaoLicense.greenDesc: Your own master gaming license from the Curacao Gaming Control Board. Full autonomy, the ability to issue sub-licenses, and maximum credibility with partners.
curacaoLicense.processSubtitle: We handle the entire process from start to finish — you focus on building your business.
curacaoLicense.ps1Desc: We assess your needs, recommend the right license type and outline the requirements and timeline.
curacaoLicense.ps2Desc: Our legal team prepares all required documents: company formation, compliance policies, business plan.
curacaoLicense.ps3Desc: We submit the application to the Curacao Gaming Control Board and manage all communication.
curacaoLicense.ps4Desc: License issued within 6-8 weeks. You're ready to accept players and start operating legally.
curacaoLicense.sf1Desc: Both Orange and Green licenses processed in 6-8 weeks. One of the fastest turnarounds in the industry for a recognized gaming jurisdiction.
curacaoLicense.sf2Desc: We prepare all required legal documents, compliance policies, AML/KYC frameworks and corporate governance documentation on your behalf.
curacaoLicense.sf3Desc: Complete company incorporation assistance in the required jurisdiction, including registered agent, office address and banking setup.
curacaoLicense.sf4Desc: Comprehensive AML policy, KYC procedures, responsible gambling policy and player protection measures — all tailored to Curacao requirements.
curacaoLicense.sf5Desc: Curacao gaming licenses are internationally recognized and accepted by major payment processors, game providers and affiliate networks.
curacaoLicense.sf6Desc: Post-licensing compliance support, annual renewal assistance, regulatory updates and consultation for any compliance questions.
curacaoLicense.licenseTypesSubtitle: Choose the license type that best fits your business model and growth plans.

anjouanLicense.heroSubtitle: One of the fastest-growing iGaming jurisdictions. Master and sub-license processing in just 4-6 weeks with competitive costs and full regulatory support.
anjouanLicense.typesSubtitle: Whether you want full autonomy with a master license or a quick start with a sub-license, we handle the process end to end.
anjouanLicense.masterDesc: Full master gaming license from the Anjouan Gaming Authority. Complete regulatory autonomy with the ability to issue sub-licenses and build your own operator network.
anjouanLicense.subTitle: Sub-License
anjouanLicense.subDesc: Operate under an established master license holder. The fastest and most affordable way to get licensed in Anjouan — ideal for new operators looking for a quick market entry.
anjouanLicense.ps1Desc: We review your business model, target markets and recommend the optimal license type for your operation.
anjouanLicense.ps2Desc: Complete preparation of corporate documents, compliance frameworks and all required regulatory submissions.
anjouanLicense.ps3Desc: We file the application with the Anjouan Gaming Authority and manage all correspondence and requirements.
anjouanLicense.ps4Desc: License approved in 4-6 weeks. Full support for activation, compliance setup and ongoing regulatory obligations.
anjouanLicense.comparisonSubtitle: Not sure which jurisdiction is right for you? Here's a quick comparison.
anjouanLicense.sf1Desc: Master and sub-licenses processed in just 4-6 weeks — among the fastest turnaround times of any iGaming jurisdiction globally.
anjouanLicense.sf2Desc: We prepare every document you need: company formation papers, compliance policies, AML/KYC framework and all regulatory submissions.
anjouanLicense.sf3Desc: Full assistance with corporate formation, registered agent setup, banking relationships and organizational structure required by the regulator.
anjouanLicense.sf4Desc: Tailored AML policy, KYC procedures, responsible gaming framework and internal controls designed specifically for Anjouan requirements.
anjouanLicense.sf5Desc: Anjouan licenses are rapidly gaining acceptance among game providers, payment processors and affiliate networks worldwide.
anjouanLicense.sf6Desc: Competitive setup fees and annual renewal costs make Anjouan one of the most affordable jurisdictions for iGaming licensing.
anjouanLicense.licenseTypesSubtitle: Whether you want full autonomy with a master license or a quick start with a sub-license, we handle the process end to end.

about.heroTitle: Powering the Next Generation of iGaming
about.heroSubtitle: MATGAMING is a B2B iGaming technology provider delivering casino aggregation, sportsbook solutions, white label platforms, crypto casino infrastructure and licensing services to operators worldwide.
about.whoP1: MATGAMING is a technology company built by iGaming industry veterans who understand the challenges operators face every day. We saw how complex and costly it was to source game content, build platforms, integrate payments and navigate licensing — and we set out to solve it all under one roof.
about.whoP2: Today, we provide a complete B2B ecosystem: from casino and sportsbook content aggregation to turnkey white label platforms, crypto-native casino solutions and fast-track iGaming licensing. Our mission is to make it possible for anyone with an entrepreneurial vision to launch and scale a successful online gaming operation.
about.whoP3: We work with operators of all sizes — from startups launching their first casino to established brands expanding into new markets. Our technology, expertise and partnerships give every partner the tools they need to compete at the highest level.
about.missionDesc: To democratize iGaming technology — making world-class casino and sportsbook infrastructure accessible to operators everywhere.
about.visionDesc: To become the most trusted B2B iGaming technology partner globally, powering the next generation of online gaming operators.
about.v1Desc: We build long-term partnerships based on honest communication, fair pricing and full transparency in every deal.
about.v2Desc: We continuously invest in technology, integrating new providers, payment methods and features to keep our partners ahead of the market.
about.v3Desc: Your success is our success. We measure ourselves by the growth and profitability of the operators we power.
about.v4Desc: We serve operators across Europe, Asia, Africa and Latin America — understanding local markets and regulatory landscapes.
about.v5Desc: Every product we deliver meets the highest standards. From platform stability to game content curation, quality is non-negotiable.
about.v6Desc: We operate with strict adherence to regulatory requirements and help our partners maintain full compliance in every jurisdiction.
about.journeySubtitle: From game aggregation to licensing — how we built a full-stack iGaming technology platform.
about.j1Desc: MATGAMING established as a B2B iGaming technology provider with a vision to simplify casino operations for operators worldwide.
about.j2Desc: Launched casino game aggregation platform, connecting operators to hundreds of game providers through a single API.
about.j3Desc: Integrated BetConstruct, Digitain and Betradar sportsbook platforms, offering complete casino + sports betting solutions.
about.j4Desc: Released turnkey White Label casino platform with full backoffice, bonus engine, affiliate system and payment processing.
about.j5Desc: Launched crypto-native casino platform supporting 50+ cryptocurrencies with instant transactions and cold storage security.
about.j6Desc: Expanded into iGaming licensing services, offering fast-track Curacao and Anjouan license processing for operators.
about.eventsTitle: Meet Us at the World's Leading iGaming Events
about.eventsSubtitle: We actively participate in the biggest iGaming exhibitions and conferences worldwide. Meet our team, see live demos and explore partnership opportunities.
about.e1Desc: The world's largest iGaming exhibition at ExCeL London. 30,000+ attendees from 150+ countries.
about.e2Desc: Premier iGaming summit in Malta bringing together operators, affiliates and technology providers.
about.e3Desc: Expanding our presence in the Asian market at the region's leading iGaming conference.
about.e4Desc: Sports Betting Community summit connecting sportsbook operators with leading technology providers.
about.e5Desc: The largest iGaming affiliate conference — connecting operators with marketing partners worldwide.
about.e6Desc: Covering the rapidly growing Latin American and North American iGaming markets.
about.eventsCta: Want to schedule a meeting at an upcoming event?
about.whyDesc: We're not just a software vendor — we're a technology partner invested in your success. From the first consultation to ongoing operations, our team is with you every step of the way.
about.why1: All-in-one ecosystem — no need for multiple vendors
about.why2: Dedicated account manager for every partner
about.why3: Continuous platform updates and new features
about.why4: Active presence at major iGaming exhibitions
about.why5: Fast response times and hands-on support
about.why6: Flexible commercial models that scale with you
